prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4556名→4727名→4910名→5899名→5815名，整体呈后移趋势，2021至2024年累计后移约1343名，2025年较2024年小幅回升约84名，基准位次约5815名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021–2024年均为29人，2025年缩减至28人，2026年（招生计划文件）回升至31人，较2025年扩招约10.7%，扩招幅度较为明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中央财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第42名，较2025年第45名上升3位，排名稳中有升，体现学校综合实力持续获得认可；2023年声誉评价为偏负面（新闻传播学类专业投档位次下滑），但2026年声誉文件中无该校负面记录；抖音热度排名第97、评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；历史投档异常方面，2023年新闻传播学类专业投档位次下滑属个别专业现象，未波及整体录取；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A、理论经济学获评A-，均为财经类核心学科，与该校金融学类、经济学类、财政学类等招生专业高度对应，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2021年推荐（72.42）→2022年分化观望（60.96）→2023年分化观望（61.15）→2024年分化观望（65.49），整体处于分化观望状态，热度较前几年有所降温；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人（含不确定标记），较2025年综合类49276人大幅增加约35%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；中央财经大学位于北京，在上海市招生占比不高，近年招生人数在28–31人之间，属跨省招生；上海考生对北京高校的地域偏好总体稳定，无明显地域偏好变化信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026年扩招约10.7%对竞争的缓解作用、上海市考生规模大幅增加带来的竞争加剧、学校软科排名上升的正面信号，以及财经类专业热度分化观望的现状，在2025年基准5815名基础上，预测2026年最低录取位次约6139名，区间5639–6639名。扩招和排名上升是位次上移（更难进）的抑制因素，但考生规模大幅增加是位次上移的主要推动力，两者综合作用下位次较2025年略有后移。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融科技（北航计算机联培项目）
- 大数据管理与应用（许国志大数据英才班）
- 保险学（北理工智能、保险联培）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数字经济（成思危拔尖班）
- 金融学（含金融学、金融学北外英语专业联培）
- 金融学类（含金融工程、金融科技专业）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（含会计学、财务管理专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（商学院）（含工商管理、市场营销、人力资源管理、供应链管理）
- 经济学类（含经济学、国民经济管理专业）
- 经济学（数理经济与数理金融）
- 财政学类（含财政学、税收学、资产评估专业）
- 金融学（国际金融与公司理财）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6139名，区间5639–6639名。位次在区间中上段（约5800名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（金融科技联培、大数据英才班）；位次在区间中段（约6100名附近）建议以二档为主（金融学类、会计学院工商管理类），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间下段（约6400名以外）建议以三档保底为主（经济学类、财政学类），二档适度冲刺。财经类专业整体热度分化，建议结合个人兴趣和职业规划选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai comprehensive subjects were approximately 4556 → 4727 → 4910 → 5899 → 5815, showing an overall backward trend. From 2021 to 2024, the cumulative backward shift was about 1343 places, and in 2025, there was a slight rebound of about 84 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 5815. The university's enrollment plan for Shanghai comprehensive subjects: from 2021 to 2024, it was 29 students each year; in 2025, it was reduced to 28; in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), it rebounded to 31 students, an increase of about 10.7% compared to 2025, which is a relatively significant expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 42nd, up 3 places from 45th in 2025, indicating a steady rise in ranking and continued recognition of its comprehensive strength. In 2023, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (the filing ranking of Journalism and Communication majors declined), but in the 2026 reputation document, there were no negative records for the university. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 97th, with an average evaluation, indicating low exposure on short video platforms. Regarding historical filing anomalies, the decline in the filing ranking of Journalism and Communication majors in 2023 was an isolated phenomenon and did not affect overall admissions. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A, and Theoretical Economics was rated A-, both core disciplines in finance and economics, highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Economics, and Public Finance, highlighting strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/economics/economy majors: recommended in 2021 (72.42) → divided and wait-and-see in 2022 (60.96) → divided and wait-and-see in 2023 (61.15) → divided and wait-and-see in 2024 (65.49), overall in a divided and wait-and-see state, with popularity cooling compared to previous years. The total number of Shanghai Gaokao examinees in 2026 is about 66,700 (including uncertain marks), a significant increase of about 35% compared to 49,276 comprehensive examinees in 2025, leading to a substantial expansion of the examinee pool and intensified competition. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, with a low enrollment proportion in Shanghai. In recent years, enrollment numbers have been between 28 and 31 students, indicating cross-provincial enrollment. Shanghai examinees' regional preference for Beijing universities is generally stable, with no obvious signals of changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the mitigating effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.7% on competition, the intensified competition due to the significant increase in Shanghai examinees, the positive signal of the university's rising Soft Science ranking, and the current divided and wait-and-see state of finance major popularity, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5815, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 6139, with a range of 5639–6639. The enrollment expansion and ranking rise are factors suppressing the upward shift (making it harder to enter), but the significant increase in examinees is the main driving force for the upward shift. Under the combined effect, the ranking will slightly shift backward compared to 2025.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Financial Technology (Beihang University Computer Joint Training Program)
- Big Data Management and Application (Xu Guozhi Big Data Talent Class)
- Insurance (Beijing Institute of Technology Intelligent, Insurance Joint Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Digital Economy (Cheng Siwei Top Talent Class)
- Finance (including Finance, Finance with Beijing Foreign Studies University English Joint Training)
- Finance Class (including Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Business Administration Class (School of Accounting) (including Accounting, Financial Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration Class (School of Business) (including Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management)
- Economics Class (including Economics, National Economic Management)
- Economics (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance)
- Public Finance Class (including Public Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation)
- Finance (International Finance and Corporate Finance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6139, range 5639–6639. For rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 5800), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Financial Technology Joint Training, Big Data Talent Class); for rankings in the middle part (around 6100), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Finance Class, Business Administration Class of School of Accounting) while also attempting Tier 1; for rankings in the lower part (beyond about 6400), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety (Economics Class, Public Finance Class) and moderately sprint for Tier 2. The overall popularity of finance and economics majors is divided, so it is recommended to combine personal interests and career plans when choosing.

_translation.university_name_en: Central University of Finance and Economics
